summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-tenant town functionality. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). UI testing verified: (1) Login shows Select Town page with Thanesar (674 properties) and xyz (0 properties), (2) Thanesar dashboard shows 674 properties and 12 employees, (3) xyz dashboard shows 0 properties and 0 employees, (4) Town switcher dropdown works correctly with page reload, (5) Properties page shows data isolation - 674 for Thanesar, empty for xyz, (6) Submissions page shows 14 for Thanesar, 0 for xyz, (7) Employees page shows all users globally for both towns (correct behavior).
passed_tests: Admin login with admin/nastu123 - SUCCESS
Select Town page shows Thanesar (THS) with 674 properties - SUCCESS
Select Town page shows xyz (XYV) with 0 properties - SUCCESS
Thanesar dashboard shows 674 total properties - SUCCESS
Thanesar dashboard shows 12 employees - SUCCESS
xyz dashboard shows 0 properties (empty) - SUCCESS
xyz dashboard shows 0 employees - SUCCESS
Town switcher dropdown with Thanesar and xyz options - SUCCESS
Town switch triggers page reload and re-fetches data - SUCCESS
Properties page for Thanesar shows 674 properties - SUCCESS
Properties page for xyz shows 'No properties found' - SUCCESS
Submissions page for Thanesar shows 14 submissions - SUCCESS
Submissions page for xyz shows 'No submissions yet' - SUCCESS
Employees page shows all users from both town contexts (global) - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/towns returns both THS and XYV towns - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/towns/manage returns property_count for each town - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/dashboard with X-Town-Code: THS returns 674 properties - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/dashboard with X-Town-Code: XYV returns 0 properties - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/properties with X-Town-Code filtering works correctly - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/submissions with X-Town-Code filtering works correctly - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/admin/users is global (not town-scoped) - SUCCESS
Backend: Login response includes accessible_towns array - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-tenant architecture correctly implemented using ContextVar middleware in server.py
X-Town-Code header correctly routes to town-specific database (THS -> test_database, XYV -> nstu_town_xyv)
Frontend axios interceptor correctly attaches X-Town-Code from localStorage to all requests
Town switcher triggers window.location.reload() to re-fetch all data with new town context
Users/Employees are stored in master_db (global), Properties/Submissions in town-specific DBs
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: Thanesar (THS) has 674 properties and 12 employees, xyz (XYV) is empty (0 properties)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant architecture verified: (1) Backend uses ContextVar middleware to set correct DB per request based on X-Town-Code header. (2) TOWN_DB_MAPPING: THS -> test_database, new towns get fresh DBs like nstu_town_xyz. (3) Frontend uses axios interceptor to attach X-Town-Code from localStorage. (4) Town switch = page reload to re-fetch all data. (5) Users are global (master_db), Properties/Submissions are town-scoped. (6) Thanesar: 674 properties, 14 submissions, 12 employees. xyz: 0 properties, 0 submissions, employees visible globally.
